block_00: We keep working with affiliates from Russia and Belarus
block_02: In light of recent events in the world, we would like to dispel the doubts — we continue to cooperate with affiliates from the Russian Federation and the Republic of Belarus. Restrictions will affect only those legal entities and individuals that are on the sanctions lists. Nevertheless, we could not avoid the changes at all — for reasons beyond our control, we will not be able to process withdrawals of the affiliate commission by wire transfers to banks from Belarus or Russia until the situation changes. If your current payment method falls under these restrictions, please replace it with an alternative one, and if none of them suit you —
block_04: and we will try to offer a solution.
block_06: Transfers to bank accounts from other countries as well as all other methods of withdrawal remain available. Payout processing time has not changed. In the meantime, we will continue to work on adding new payment methods and will be glad to hear your suggestions.
